subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath revealed Himself unto all created things through the manifestation of the traces of His Most Exalted Pen, and hath deposited within the realities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی علی من فی الانشاء بظهور آثار قلمه الاعلی و اودع فی حقایق
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @idolatry, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
